CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Patterned-Golden Core
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: The condensed core matures into a radiant Golden Core with magnificent pattern. Power flows endlessly from it, granting immense vitality and spiritual might. The cultivator now stands firmly above the mortal world. at this stage, cultivator no longer have a need to rest and sleep, and can replenish said needs by simply absorbing Qi from the air. a Patterned-Golden Core cultivator is a rare case, and have power equivalent to a Nascent Soul Cultivator. \n\nRequire: Pure Qi source

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Dual-Nascent Soul
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: The golden core shatters, birthing an indestructible nascent soul—a miniature self that escapes bodily death to reform elsewhere. Pawns regenerate from a drop of blood, their presence warping reality around them. at this stage, cultivator are capable of forming a layer of protective Qi around them. a Double-Nascent Soul cultivator gave birth to a twin-soul rather than only one, they are much faster at cultivating compared to other Nascent Soul Cultivator \n\nRequire: Nascent Qi source

li.gizmoTip: A layer of protection Qi produced by cultivator of high realm.
